title: Unified topology-traversal engine
scope:
Extract a single walkTopology() engine that drives every existing topology consumer (canvas dagre map, table state, flyout, scope rail) plus a new fifth surface (gadmin user-to-node assignment picker) with one walk, one orphan policy, one sort knob.

Engine ships in TypeScript at app/lib/shared/topology/walker.ts and is mirrored in Go at backend/internal/shared/topology/walker.go. Parity locked via golden-fixture JSON tests under dev/fixtures/shared/topology/ read byte-identically by both Vitest and Go test suites.

Iteration 1 powers BFF reads via orgdesign.Service.Tree() calling the shared walker; /samantha/v2/topology/tree public exposure deferred to a follow-up plan. MyGrant.position is added to the Go struct + ListMyGrants query so ScopeRail can switch from byLabel to byPosition and match canvas order.
value:
Topology data is currently walked four times independently (canvas dagre, useTopologyTreeState, TopologyTreeFlyout, ScopeRail) with subtle drift between each walk producing user-visible bugs — notably the phantom orphan "D" row in ScopeRail. A fifth surface (user-to-node assignment) is about to land and would have been a fifth re-write.

R052 + R053 research confirmed the data model is universal (single-FK ownership, recursive-CTE walks); the duplication is purely an artefact of incremental delivery. Extracting now removes a structural bottleneck before any further topology UI work (move semantics, ancestor breadcrumbs, materialised paths).

Locks UI↔BFF↔public-API parity at the algorithm level, not at the HTTP boundary. Future changes touch one function, not five.
implementation_plan: Commit 1: walkTopology() engine + golden fixtures + Vitest suite + Go mirror with parity tests. Depends on PLA-0045 substrate having shipped.
Commit 2: MyGrant.position field + ListMyGrants ORDER BY position, name (no frontend change yet).
Commit 3: refactor layoutWithDagre to use walkTopology — manual smoke canvas card map unchanged.
Commit 4: refactor useTopologyTreeState to destructure childrenOf from walker result.
Commit 5: refactor TopologyTreeFlyout to use walkTopology with rootHasSpine=true, byInputOrder; removes depth-0 quirk.
Commit 6: refactor ScopeRail to use walkTopology with rootHasSpine=false, byPosition, orphanPolicy=drop; fixes phantom D orphan; sorts match canvas.
Commit 7: BFF /_site/topology/tree handler refactored to call orgdesign.Service.Tree() which calls shared/topology.WalkTopology for scope-clamped responses.
Commit 8: docs — catalogue row append, tech-debt close-out S3, CLAUDE.md one-liner pointing at shared topology README.
New surface: UserNodeAssignment.tsx (gadmin-only tree picker with checkbox cell renderer) — ships once walker exists; FE-POR-0003.9.10.
Visual smoke pass (manual) on canvas, table, flyout, rail after each refactor commit; final pass before PR merge.
areas_impacted: POR: topology canvas, table view, flyout — all four existing consumer refactors plus the new UserNodeAssignment picker surface.
API: BFF /_site/topology/tree handler routed through shared walker; /samantha/v2/topology/tree exposure deferred (R9).
SQL: MyGrant struct gains position field + ListMyGrants SELECT/ORDER change — no schema migration (position already on topology_nodes).
DEV: docs/c_shared_methods.md catalogue row, docs/c_tech_debt.md S3 close-out, CLAUDE.md pointer addition.
GOV: parity-fixture contract locks TS↔Go algorithm equivalence in CI.
feature_list: walkTopology() TypeScript engine in app/lib/shared/topology/walker.ts — generic over TopologyNode shape.
WalkResult exposes rows + visibleIds + visibleEdges + childrenOf in one pass.
Configurable: sort comparator, filter, collapsed set, maxDepth (default 12 — matches DescendantNodeIDs).
Renderer-side spine policy — walker emits ancestorMoreChildren for every row; depth-0 spine column is renderer business.
Go mirror at backend/internal/shared/topology/walker.go using generic struct with accessor funcs.
Golden-fixture JSON tests under dev/fixtures/shared/topology/ shared byte-identical between Vitest + Go.
Vitest suite covering flat-list, single-root-deep, multi-root-forest, orphan-drop, cycle-guard, collapse-hides-subtree.
MyGrant.position field + ListMyGrants ORDER BY position, name (replaces ORDER BY name).
ScopeRail sort comparator switches from byLabel to byPosition after MyGrant.position lands — same PR family.
ScopeRail orphan re-rooting bug removed — drops orphans matching canvas behaviour.
BFF /_site/topology/tree calls shared WalkTopology for scope-clamped responses.
UserNodeAssignment.tsx — gadmin-only tree picker with checkbox row renderer, wired into user-management page.
Tech-debt register row closed: four independent topology walks (open since PLA-0006).
features_extended: TopologyTreeFlyout — replaces local flatten() with walker call; depth-0 quirk removed.
layoutWithDagre — replaces inline walk(roots) + visibleEdges loop with single walker call; dagre coords attached after (no coord coupling).
useTopologyTreeState — destructures childrenOf from walker result instead of separate useMemo.
orgdesign.Service.Tree() — refactored to call shared/topology.WalkTopology when scope clamp present; un-clamped responses unchanged.
docs/c_shared_methods.md — gains row for walkTopology (catalogue file owned by PLA-0045).
features_removed: Local flatten() recursion in app/components/TopologyTreeFlyout.tsx (lines 97-148) including depth-0 pathMoreChildren=[] special-case.
Local buildTree() recursion in app/components/ScopeRail.tsx (lines 56-108) including orphan re-rooting (line 62).

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Vitest suite covers 9 cases: flat-list, single-root-deep, multi-root-forest, orphan-drop, cycle-guard, collapse-hides-subtree, sort-by-label, sort-by-position, edges-only-visible
Six golden fixtures land under dev/fixtures/shared/topology/ as {input,expected} JSON

risks.risk: R1 — Edge generation in canvas coupled to dagre coords
risks.mitigation: Walker emits abstract {source,target} pairs only; dagre attaches coords after. Verified against current code (lines 51-58 of layoutWithDagre).
Walker is generic with injected comparator; rail uses byLabel until 00538 lands position in same PR family.

risks.risk: R3 — TS↔Go parity drift over time
risks.mitigation: Golden-fixture JSON tests in dev/fixtures/shared/topology/; both suites read same bytes; CI runs both.

risks.risk: R4 — ScopeRail orphan-drop hides legit grants
risks.mitigation: Drop is intentional — canvas already drops; rail re-root was the bug. Followup: is_ancestor_only breadcrumb grants (separate plan).
Walker doesn't own collapsed state — accepts as input. Consumers manage their own state. No coupling.
Renamed for clarity; single fork point in walker (depth-0 ancestor init); other geometry unchanged.

risks.risk: R7 — Generic TS + React Flow type friction
risks.mitigation: Walker emits domain types only; consumers wrap to React Flow themselves — unchanged from today.
Walker unit tests + golden fixtures land FIRST. Snapshot test per consumer locked BEFORE consumer refactor. Visual smoke is final gate, not first.

risks.risk: R9 — Public API freeze on tree-walk surface
risks.mitigation: Iteration 1 powers BFF (/_site/topology/tree) only; /samantha/v2/topology/tree exposure deferred to followup plan.

risks.risk: R10 — Cyclic topology data crashes walker
risks.mitigation: Depth cap (12, matches DescendantNodeIDs); synthetic cycle-truncated row emitted.
